rationale: Books is decomposed by accounting module so each report is precise and module-owned.

sessions.name: Login + Dashboard
sessions.description: Land on dashboard, capture KPIs and global controls.

sessions.name: Sales / Invoices
sessions.description: Sales invoices, quotations, credit notes, recurring.

sessions.name: Purchase / Bills
sessions.description: Purchase orders, bills, debit notes, expense claims.

sessions.name: Inventory
sessions.description: Items, stock movements, adjustments, valuation, BOM.

sessions.name: Reports & Filters
sessions.description: P&L, BS, ledgers, ageing, day book, drill-down.

sessions.name: Accounting / Journal
sessions.description: Journal entries, period close, audit trail.

sessions.name: Settings & Configuration
sessions.description: Org, branches, FY, taxes, templates, users, permissions.
